title: cephalomanes acrosorum
intro: Cephalomanes acrosorum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the delicate or creeping filmy fern. It is a type of vascular plant that is native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Cephalomanes acrosorum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves for topical application.
